subcodes.first_line: O Bāqir! We have hearkened unto thy call and have beheld thy devotion. We make mention of thee with that which shall endure throughout the dominion of earth and heaven. We made mention of thee before [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا باقر سمعنا ندائک و راینا اقبالک ذکرناک بما یبقی بدوام الملک و الملکوت ذکرناک من قبل
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
